title: rosa canina subvar. vinealis
intro: Rosa canina subvar. vinealis, also known as the Dog Rose Vinealis, is a subspecies of the Dog Rose shrub, a flowering plant native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. vinealis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Rosa canina subvar. vinealis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used as a topical cream to harness its medicinal properties.
